headline: SanDisk Sinks 11%, Seagate Falls 7%, Micron Slides 4% on Memory Supply-Glut Fears
summary: Memory and storage stocks are sliding again Thursday morning, extending a rare pullback for a group that has posted extraordinary gains through 2026. SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) stock is leading the declines, down 11% to $1,802 in midday trading. Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) shares are off 7% to $852, Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) shares are down 7% to $556 ... SanDisk Sinks 11%, Seagate Falls 7%, Micron Slides 4% on Memory Supply-Glut Fears
